_doc: Hand-labeled by the /loop agent. Key = prompt timestamp. phase: red|green|refactor|spec|meta|ops. summary = high-level of what the agent did next (not full output). details = optional bullets (files/tests).

2026-06-25T02:49:14.550Z.summary: Split the user stories into independent vertical slices with SPIDR and wrote one file per story under docs/backlog/.

2026-06-25T02:51:49.037Z.summary: Brainstormed visualization ideas for the prompt journey and interviewed for audience, data source, and medium.

2026-06-25T02:52:23.141Z.summary: Reformatted the Given/When/Then acceptance criteria onto separate lines across the backlog story files.

2026-06-25T02:56:39.756Z.summary: Mapped the three sessions, excluded the harness-setup session, and created a git worktree so the viz work would not touch the in-progress branch.

2026-06-25T02:57:54.015Z.summary: Approved committing and pushing the backlog work via the commit skill.

2026-06-25T02:58:02.354Z.summary: Ran the commit skill: staged the backlog, wrote a short message, committed and pushed.

2026-06-25T02:58:15.908Z.summary: Granted permission to skip the TDD gate for the viz tooling; switched to writing tooling files via shell.
details: bypassed TDD gate for non-kata tooling

2026-06-25T02:58:38.979Z.summary: Continued building the extractor and inspecting transcript structure.

2026-06-25T02:59:34.491Z.summary: Stashed the viz tooling, amended the src commit, then resumed the backlog work to keep history clean.

2026-06-25T03:00:23.414Z.summary: Paused the build to present a revised plan and ASCII wireframes, pivoting the design to a speech-bubble conversation with agent summaries.

2026-06-25T03:03:34.133Z.summary: Did not implement the kata; created an empty src/index.ts placeholder and amended the commit to satisfy the failing check.

2026-06-25T03:09:30.138Z.summary: Kicked off the kata: orchestrate the full backlog one behavior at a time, spawning a subagent per behavior, committing after each passing test (in progress).

2026-06-25T03:28:24.641Z.summary: Made test builders intention-revealing per Arlo Belshee's readable-test standards (e.g. aCharacterAtLevel(6) over bare magic numbers).

2026-06-25T03:30:29.454Z.summary: Moved conventions out of hidden agent memory into version-controlled AGENTS.md so anyone on the repo can see them; set a rule for all future saves.
details: no hidden memory for repo conventions

2026-06-25T03:31:02.868Z.summary: Set the test-file convention: all helper functions at the bottom, ordered by first call; recorded it in AGENTS.md.
details: helpers at bottom, ordered by first call

2026-06-25T03:32:33.644Z.summary: Directed the orchestrator to commit, compact context, and continue spawning subagents for the next behaviors while preserving the task list.

2026-06-25T03:27:31.169Z.summary: Questioned an opaque test builder (aCharacter(6)), prompting the move to intention-revealing builder names.

2026-06-25T03:25:08.339Z.summary: Invoked the refactor-tests skill to clean up the Story 1 test suite for clarity and behavioral coverage.

2026-06-25T03:22:02.518Z._note: typo'd duplicate of the prettier-fixes prompt

2026-06-25T03:22:12.999Z.summary: Asked to continue prettier fixes and rewrite history so formatting-only changes to non-src files aren't bundled into commits.
details: rewrite commits to drop stray formatting

2026-06-25T03:25:06.047Z.summary: Before Story 2, asked to run /refactor-tests to extract helper functions and improve test readability.

2026-06-25T03:41:11.647Z.summary: Flagged the growing Character test file and asked for three ways to split it.
details: offered: By capability area · Nested describe, one file · By backlog story
split into 4 capability test files + shared character-builders.ts
17 tests green; commit amended to be atomic

2026-06-25T04:03:45.440Z.summary: Ran the sweep skill to review the codebase for structural smells (file/method length, complexity, test readability).

2026-06-25T04:14:27.457Z.summary: Shared the current flat folder structure (screenshot) and asked to weigh restructuring options and their tradeoffs.

2026-06-25T04:18:07.180Z.summary: Framed the folder-structure decision around the repo's purpose — a demo for coaches — to choose the best layout.

2026-06-25T04:28:52.848Z.summary: Pushed back on whether a proposed change was actually necessary before accepting it.

2026-06-25T04:30:52.119Z.summary: Asked for the review findings — a multi-agent review panel flagged H1/H3/M2 as real correctness bugs to fix via TDD, downgrading non-bugs.
details: review panel: H1, H3, M2 to fix

2026-06-25T04:31:56.070Z.summary: Decided to save the review to a PDF in docs/ and consciously end the kata here — it's a kata, not a product.
details: save review as PDF under docs/

2026-06-25T04:32:52.494Z.summary: Approved continuing with saving the review PDF and wrapping up the kata.

2026-06-25T04:35:11.577Z.summary: Flagged markdown issues (stray * etc.) in the saved review doc and asked to fix, then commit and push everything.
